subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who is the author of the book 'Rajasthan: A Study in Regional Development'?
question_hi: राजस्थान: एक रेजीविक प्रतिरोध के लेखक कौन हैं ?
explanation_en: Dr. B.R. Mehrotra is the author of the book 'Rajasthan: A Study in Regional Development'.
explanation_hi: Dr. B.R. Mehrotra राजस्थान: एक जिमेंट के एक डीजन

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which palace was built by Maharaja Jai Singh II?
explanation_en: Kishangarh Fort was built by Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II.
explanation_hi: Kishangarh Fort महाराजा सावाई मैन सिंग एल मेंट
